title: Glass Shatter
description: Instead of glass just breaking it turns in to shatters that can be build back to a block once more!
body:
When you break a glass block you get 9 Shattered Glass items (glass pane gives 6).
Then smelt them:

![how to make Glass 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2596d63bc062119d846aaa53d92401a9ac3bf778.png)

After you smelt them you get hot glass. With this hot glass you can make a glass pane like so:

![how to make Glass 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43bad184d90dd30f83f8e27a39245af67dbb33e4.png)

With three hot glass you will get glass panes wich you can use to craft a glass block like this:

![how to make Glass 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0034af0a5fb41779279137d2007197ee6409c6d.png)

9 glass panes will make one glass block.

Just like that you have made a glass block from Shattered Glass!
